title: berkheya cardopatifolia
intro: Berkheya cardopatifolia, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is also known as the blue mountain daisy or Bergantola. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Berkheya cardopatifolia is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
